attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
NATLGD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE            AS ACCOUNT_CLASS,
WNIVIO.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE       AS ACCOUNT_CODE,

/* NAAR.SK_RULE_ID_INT                as ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID, */
CASE WHEN WNIARO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE (CAST(SMRR_RULE.RULE_ID AS BIGINT), SMFRR_RULE.RULE_ID)
     ELSE COALESCE (CAST(SMRR_CUR.RULE_ID  AS BIGINT),SMFRR_CUR.RULE_ID)
END AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,

/* WNIARO.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME              as ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, */
CASE WHEN WNIARO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN WNIARO.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
     ELSE WNICO.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME  
END AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,

WNICO.ACCTD_AMOUNT                      AS ACCTD_AMOUNT,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
NULL                                        AS ADJUSTMENT_ID,
NULL                                        AS ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,
NULL                                        AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
WNICO.AMOUNT                          AS AMOUNT,
1 AS BATCH_ID,
NULL                                   AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
NULL                                   AS BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
ENGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT    as CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
NULL                                   AS COGS_PERCENT,
NULL                                   AS COMMENTS,
WNICO.CONTEXT                             AS CONTEXT,
current_timestamp(0)                as CREATE_DATETIME,
1                                     as CREATED_BY,
current_timestamp(0)                AS CREATION_DATE,
NATLGD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT AS CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT            AS CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT   AS CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
WNISCFO.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG               AS DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
NULL                                        AS EXTENDED_AMOUNT,
'INV'                                    AS EXTRACT_TYPE,
WNICO.FISCAL_ID                       AS FISCAL_ID,
'F'                                   AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,
NULL                              AS FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,
current_timestamp(0) AS GES_UPDATE_DATE,
WNICO.GL_DATE                    AS GL_DATE,
EORCTLG.GL_POSTED_DATE               AS GL_POSTED_DATE,
NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME                  AS GLOBAL_NAME,
NULL AS GROUPING_ID,
NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT         AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE        AS INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,
NULL                              AS INVOICE_PERCENT,
NULL                                   AS INVOICING_RULE_ID,
current_timestamp(0)           AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
1                                AS LAST_UPDATED_BY,
'Y'                              AS LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,
NULL                              AS LINE_PERCENT,
SC_TV.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT  AS LINE_SEQ_ID ,         
NULL                              AS LINE_TYPE,
NULL                              AS LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
CASE     WHEN SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD        ='O' THEN SSO_SC.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT
          ELSE SSO_DFLT_SC.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT
END    AS ORDER_HEADER_ID , 
CASE WHEN    WNIGLO.LINE_ID = -9999    THEN 
                   CASE WHEN SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD = 'O' THEN NSOL_SC.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT 
                             ELSE NULL
                   END
          ELSE WNIGLO.LINE_ID
END AS ORDER_LINE_ID  ,
WNIGLO.ORDER_NUMBER                    as ORDER_NUMBER,
WNICO.ORG_ID                           AS ORG_ID,
NULL                              AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
NULL                              AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
'Y'                                   AS QUOTA_FLAG ,  
NULL                                   AS REASON_CODE,
NULL                              AS REBATE_AMOUNT,
NULL                              AS REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,
CASE WHEN WNICO.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG = 'Y' THEN NULL 
          ELSE 999   
END AS REQUEST_ID,

/* WNIARO.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE       AS RULE_START_DATE, */
CASE WHEN WNIARO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN WNIARO.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
     ELSE WNICO.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE 
END AS RULE_START_DATE,

SC_TV.EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID ,  
SC_TV.EP_SK_SALESREP_ID_INT    AS SALESREP_ID ,
NULL                                                 AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
NULL                                                 AS SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
NULL                                                 AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD AS SOURCE_TYPE , 
SC_TV.SCA_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT       AS SPLIT_PERCENT ,   
SC_TV.EP_SK_TERRITORY_ID_INT          AS TERRITORY_ID , 
CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE <= EAMPD.END_DATE   THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ELSE EAMPD.END_DATE END AS TRANSACTION_DATE,
'O'                                            AS TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE ,
CASE WHEN WNICO.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' and NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE  = 'LINE' THEN
              NATIL.RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY 
      ELSE NATIL.RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY  
END  as TRANSACTION_QUANTITY  ,
NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME        AS TRX_DATE,
NULL                              AS TRX_NAME,
NAT.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER       AS TRX_NUMBER,
WNICO.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE      as TRX_TYPE,
NULL                              AS UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
NULL                              AS UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
'INV'                           AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
WNICO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
SC_TV.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE     ,
SC_TV.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
SC_TV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
SC_TV.SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT  AS SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT
FROM 
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_OOD WNICO
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
     ON WNICO.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
     ON WNICO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_GET_LINES_OOD WNIGLO 
     ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNIGLO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
/* ADDING NEW JOIN TO GET SS_CODE AND GLOBAL_NAME */
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL   ELOHA
     ON ELOHA.ORDER_NUMBER = WNIGLO.ORDER_NUMBER
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC1
     ON ELOHA.SS_CODE = NSSC1.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE     
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_VAL_INV_OOD WNIVIO 
     ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNIVIO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_ACCT_RULE_OOD WNIARO
     ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNIARO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_SLS_CRE_FLG_OOD WNISCFO
     ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNISCFO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST NATLGD
     ON WNICO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY = NATLGD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA
     ON ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = WNICO.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
/* use st_om_ra_rules for rule_id : rchettri
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ACCOUNTING_RULE NAAR  
     on NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME   = WNICO.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME
*/  
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_OOD_FUSN_RA_RULES    SMRR_RULE  
     ON  SMRR_RULE.NAME  = WNIARO.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_RULES SMRR_CUR  
     ON  SMRR_CUR.NAME  = WNICO.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME   	 
	 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_OOD_FUSN_RA_RULES    SMFRR_RULE  
     ON  SMFRR_RULE.NAME  = WNIARO.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_RULES SMFRR_CUR  
     ON  SMFRR_CUR.NAME  = WNICO.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME    	 
     
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
     ON WNICO.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY    
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
     ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_GLDT EORCTLG
     ON EORCTLG.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID  = NATLGD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
     ON (NP.ITEM_KEY = WNICO.ITEM_KEY )   
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_APPL_AR_TRX_LINE_ASSGN NAATLA
     ON NAATLA.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNISCFO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY     
/* Changed as part of Sales Credits changes */  
/* LEFT OUTER JOIN   $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_ASSGNMENT_TV  SC_TV 
     ON SC_TV.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY =  NAATLA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
     AND SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CODE = WNISCFO.SOURCE_TYPE 
     AND SC_TV.SS_CODE =     NSSC1.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE   
     AND SC_TV.END_TV_DATETIME  = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'  */
     
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SCA_FOR_ALL_TRX_NRT_HIST_TV SC_TV
ON SC_TV .RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NAATLA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
 AND SC_TV.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD     = WNISCFO.SOURCE_TYPE 
 AND  SC_TV.END_TV_DTM  = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'


/*  LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP ESR
     ON(SC_TV.BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER=ESR.SALES_REP_NUMBER 
          AND ESR.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC1.GLOBAL_NAME )    
LEFT OUTER JOIN    $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ESCT
     ON(SC_TV.BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE=ESCT.NAME 
          AND ESCT.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC1.GLOBAL_NAME )    
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY EST_HIER
     ON (SC_TV.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY=EST_HIER.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
          AND EST_HIER.GLOBAL_NAME='BO'  ) */
/* Changed as part of Sales Credits changes */ 
          
          
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL_SC
     ON SC_TV.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOL_SC.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_SC
     ON NSOL_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY
/* commented : rchettri
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ESCT
     on ESCT.SK_CREDIT_TYPE_ID = SC_TV.EP_SK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID_INT
     AND ESCT.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
*/  
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_DFLT_SC
     ON WNIGLO.ORDER_NUMBER = NSO_DFLT_SC.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT              
     AND  NSO_DFLT_SC.SS_CODE=  NSSC1.GLOBAL_NAME   /* NSO_DFLT_SC.SS_CODE='BV'  */ 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_DFLT_SC
     ON NSO_DFLT_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO_DFLT_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY     
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DT EAMPD        
     ON EAMPD.FISCAL_ID = WNICO.FISCAL_ID
WHERE 1=1
AND  WNISCFO.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG = 'N'

SELECT
WNICO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
,WNICO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,WNICO.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
,WNICO.CONTEXT
,CASE WHEN WNICO.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM' THEN 'C' ELSE 'I' END SOURCE_TYPE
, NULL SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT
,CASE WHEN WNICO.CONTEXT = 'METRIX' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END METRIX_FLAG
,'Y' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_OOD WNICO
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_SLS_CRE_FLG_OOD Y WHERE  WNICO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  = Y.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY )

SELECT 
WNICO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
CASE WHEN WNICO.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS' AND  WNICO.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE='REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN
		NII.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME       
ELSE 
	WNICO.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME
END AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
CASE WHEN WNICO.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS' AND WNICO.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE='REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN
		WNIVIO.GL_DATE       
ELSE WNICO.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
END AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_OOD WNICO
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON WNICO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_VAL_INV_OOD  WNIVIO
ON WNICO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNIVIO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
INNER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NII
ON WNICO.ITEM_KEY = NII.ITEM_KEY
AND NII.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = 1
WHERE  WNICO.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM'

SELECT
NATLGD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE			AS ACCOUNT_CLASS,
WNIVIO.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE    	AS ACCOUNT_CODE,
/* NAAR.SK_RULE_ID_INT                	AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID, */
CASE WHEN WNIARO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE (CAST(SMRR_RULE.RULE_ID AS BIGINT), SMFRR_RULE.RULE_ID)
	ELSE COALESCE (CAST(SMRR_CUR.RULE_ID  AS BIGINT),SMFRR_CUR.RULE_ID)
END AS 	ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID,

/* WNIARO.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME 			AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, */ 
CASE WHEN WNIARO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN WNIARO.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
	ELSE WNICO.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME  
END AS 	ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,

WNICO.ACCTD_AMOUNT					AS ACCTD_AMOUNT,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
NULL 								AS ADJUSTMENT_ID,
NULL 								AS ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,
NULL 								AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE,
WNICO.AMOUNT						AS AMOUNT,
1 AS BATCH_ID,
NULL								AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
NULL								AS BILL_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
ENGLA.SK_CODE_COMBINATION_ID_INT    AS CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
NULL								AS COGS_PERCENT,
NULL								AS COMMENTS,
WNICO.CONTEXT 						AS CONTEXT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 				AS CREATE_DATETIME,
1 								AS CREATED_BY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 				AS CREATION_DATE,
NATLGD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT AS CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID,
NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT        	AS CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT   AS CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
WNISCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG				AS DEFAULT_SC_FLAG,
NULL 								AS EXTENDED_AMOUNT,
'INV'								AS EXTRACT_TYPE,
WNICO.FISCAL_ID					AS FISCAL_ID,
'F'								AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLAG,
NULL							AS FUNC_CURRENCY_CODE,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS GES_UPDATE_DATE,
WNICO.GL_DATE					AS GL_DATE,
EORCTLG.GL_POSTED_DATE				AS GL_POSTED_DATE,
NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME				AS GLOBAL_NAME,
NULL AS GROUPING_ID,
NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT		AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE     	AS INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,
NULL							AS INVOICE_PERCENT,
NULL 							AS INVOICING_RULE_ID,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 			AS LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
1							AS LAST_UPDATED_BY,
'Y' 							AS LATEST_RECORD_FLAG,
NULL							AS LINE_PERCENT,
NULL 							AS LINE_SEQ_ID 		,	
NULL							AS LINE_TYPE,
NULL							AS LINK_TO_CUST_TRX_LINE_ID,
SSO_DFLT_SC.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  AS 	ORDER_HEADER_ID  ,
WNIGLO.LINE_ID  AS 	ORDER_LINE_ID , 
WNIGLO.ORDER_NUMBER					AS ORDER_NUMBER,
WNICO.ORG_ID						AS ORG_ID,
NULL							AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
NULL							AS PREVIOUS_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID,
'Y'								AS QUOTA_FLAG ,  
NULL 							AS REASON_CODE,
NULL							AS REBATE_AMOUNT,
NULL							AS REBATE_PERCENTAGE_ID,
CASE	WHEN WNICO.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG = 'Y' THEN NULL 
		ELSE 999   
END AS REQUEST_ID,
/* WNIARO.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE		AS RULE_START_DATE, */
CASE WHEN WNIARO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN WNIARO.ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
	ELSE WNICO.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE 
END AS 	RULE_START_DATE,
1000			AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_ID ,
CASE	WHEN WNISCF.METRIX_FLAG ='Y' THEN 12520
		ELSE 1872
END		AS SALES_REP_ID , 
NULL 										AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
NULL 										AS SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
NULL 										AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ID,
CASE WHEN WNICO.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' THEN 'C' ELSE 'I' END AS SOURCE_TYPE  , 
100							AS SPLIT_PERCENT ,
1161	AS TERRITORY_ID , 
CASE WHEN CURRENT_DATE <= EAMPD.END_DATE   THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) ELSE EAMPD.END_DATE END AS TRANSACTION_DATE,
'O'										AS TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE ,
CASE WHEN WNICO.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE ='CM' AND NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE  = 'LINE' THEN
			NATIL.RU_CREDIT_QUANTITY 
	 ELSE NATIL.RU_DEBIT_QUANTITY  
END  AS TRANSACTION_QUANTITY  ,
NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME        AS TRX_DATE,
NULL							AS TRX_NAME,
NAT.BK_AR_TRX_NUMBER       AS TRX_NUMBER,
WNICO.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE		AS TRX_TYPE,
NULL 						AS UNIT_SELLING_PRICE,
NULL 						AS UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE,
'INV'						AS DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
WNICO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY	AS DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
'Direct Sales' AS BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
CAST (99998 AS VARCHAR(30)) AS SALES_REP_NUMBER,
 73106 AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,
 -999 AS SK_SC_AGENT_ID_INT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_OOD WNICO
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON WNICO.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
	ON WNICO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_GET_LINES_OOD WNIGLO 
	ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNIGLO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
/* ADDING NEW JOIN TO GET SS_CODE*/
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL	ELOHA
	ON ELOHA.ORDER_NUMBER = WNIGLO.ORDER_NUMBER

INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_VAL_INV_OOD  WNIVIO
	ON WNICO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNIVIO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_ACCT_RULE_OOD WNIARO  
	ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNIARO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_SLS_CRE_FLG_OOD WNISCF
	ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNISCF.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST NATLGD
	ON WNICO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY = NATLGD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA
	ON ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY = WNICO.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
	
/* USE ST_OM_RA_RULES FOR RULE_ID : RCHETTRI	
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ACCOUNTING_RULE NAAR
	ON NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME   = WNICO.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME
*/	
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_RULES    SMRR_RULE	
	ON  SMRR_RULE.NAME  = WNIARO.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_RULES SMRR_CUR	
	ON  SMRR_CUR.NAME  = WNICO.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME	

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_OOD_FUSN_RA_RULES    SMFRR_RULE  
     ON  SMFRR_RULE.NAME  = WNIARO.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME          
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_OOD_RA_RULES SMFRR_CUR  
     ON  SMFRR_CUR.NAME  = WNICO.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME 
	 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
	ON WNICO.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY	
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
	ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_GLDT EORCTLG
ON EORCTLG.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID  = NATLGD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
 ON (NP.ITEM_KEY = WNICO.ITEM_KEY )	
	
/*LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_CREDIT_TYPES ESCT_INIT_VAR
	ON ESCT_INIT_VAR.NAME  = 'DIRECT SALES'
	AND ESCT_INIT_VAR.GLOBAL_NAME = 'BO' 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP    ESP_INIT_VAR_IF              
	ON ESP_INIT_VAR_IF.SALES_REP_NAME  = 'FSO METRIX INVOICE'	
	AND ESP_INIT_VAR_IF.GLOBAL_NAME = 'BO' 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_REP    ESP_INIT_VAR_I              
	ON ESP_INIT_VAR_I.SALES_REP_NAME  = 'MISC. U.S.'	
	AND ESP_INIT_VAR_I.GLOBAL_NAME = 'BO' 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_TERRITORY    EST_INIT_VAR             
	ON EST_INIT_VAR.TERRITORY_NAME   = 'MISC. U.S.'	
	AND EST_INIT_VAR.GLOBAL_NAME ='BO' */
	
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_DFLT_SC
	ON WNIGLO.ORDER_NUMBER = NSO_DFLT_SC.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT              
	AND  NSO_DFLT_SC.SS_CODE  =ELOHA.SS_CODE	  /*  REMOVING NSO_DFLT_SC.SS_CODE  ='BV'	 */
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_DFLT_SC
	ON NSO_DFLT_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO_DFLT_SC.SALES_ORDER_KEY	
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DT EAMPD		
	ON EAMPD.FISCAL_ID = WNICO.FISCAL_ID
WHERE 1=1
AND  WNISCF.SALES_CREDIT_FLAG = 'Y'

SELECT
WNICO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
WNICO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,
CASE WHEN NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT IS NOT NULL THEN NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT
	ELSE 
		CASE WHEN WNICO.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('CM','DM') THEN 0 WHEN WNICO.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'INV' THEN -9999 END
	END AS LINE_ID,

CASE WHEN NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT IS NOT NULL THEN NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
	ELSE
		/* COALESCE(NSO_AR.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,0) : RCHETTRI */
		CASE WHEN WNICO.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('CM','DM')  AND NSO_AR.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT < 0 THEN 0 ELSE COALESCE(NSO_AR.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,0) END
	END AS ORDER_NUMBER
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_OOD WNICO
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_APPL_AR_TRX_LINE_ASSGN NAATLA
ON NAATLA.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNICO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
AND NAATLA.SS_CODE = WNICO.SS_CODE
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NAATLA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO
ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
ON WNICO.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSO_AR
ON NAT.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO_AR.SALES_ORDER_KEY

SELECT 
WNICEO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
,WNICEO.AR_TRX_KEY
,WNICEO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
, NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
,WNICEO.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY      
,WNICEO.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY       
,NATIL.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME  
,NATIL.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE 
,NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME          
,WNICEO.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE  
,WNICEO. GL_DATE
,WNICEO.SS_CODE
,NULL AS CONTEXT 
,NATIL.PRODUCT_KEY  ITEM_KEY
,WNIVIO.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
,CASE WHEN NATIL.AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE   = 'DEBIT' THEN NATIL.RU_DEBIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT   ELSE NATIL.RU_CREDIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT     END AS AMOUNT
,((CASE WHEN WNICEO.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1) END) *
(CASE WHEN NATIL.AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE   = 'DEBIT' THEN NATIL.RU_DEBIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT   ELSE NATIL.RU_CREDIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT     END)) AS ACCTD_AMOUNT
,WNICEO.FISCAL_ID
,NCOU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AS ORG_ID
, WNICEO.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG

FROM
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_EXP_OOD WNICEO
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON WNICEO.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_VAL_INV_OOD  WNIVIO
ON WNICEO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNIVIO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = WNICEO.BK_COMPANY_CODE
AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = WNICEO.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = WNICEO.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = WNICEO.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORG_SOB_COMPANY  EOOSC
ON EOOSC.SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME=NSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME        
AND EOOSC.COMPANY_CODE= WNICEO.BK_COMPANY_CODE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU
ON NCOU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT=EOOSC.ORGANIZATION_ID
AND OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD='OOD'
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
ON WNICEO.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS 
ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY           
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNICEO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
/* commented : rchettri
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ACCOUNTING_RULE NAAR
ON NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME = NATIL.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME
*/
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR
ON NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = WNICEO.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE
AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE           = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE 
AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE = WNICEO.TRX_DATE
AND NCCDR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE       = 'Corporate'        
WHERE
 NATIL.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME 
= 'MITG Service'

SELECT 
WI_NCR_INV_VAL_INV_OOD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
WI_NCR_INV_VAL_INV_OOD.GL_DATE,
WI_NCR_INV_VAL_INV_OOD.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
WI_NCR_INV_VAL_INV_OOD.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE, 
WI_NCR_INV_VAL_INV_OOD.OOD_CODE_COMBINATION_ID, 
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME, 
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
FROM
 $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_VAL_INV_OOD
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLONLYDB.EL_OOD_NCR_INV_VAL_INV
WHERE EL_OOD_NCR_INV_VAL_INV.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY=WI_NCR_INV_VAL_INV_OOD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY )

SELECT 
WNICEO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
,WNICEO.AR_TRX_KEY
,WNICEO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
, NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
,WNICEO.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY      
,WNICEO.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY       

,CASE WHEN CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END <> 'UNKNOWN' THEN 
	CASE WHEN NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT' OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS'  AND WNICEO.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE  <> 'REVENUE TRANSFER') THEN
		NATIL_ADJ.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME
	END
ELSE
	CASE WHEN NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS'  AND WNICEO.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE =  'REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN
		COALESCE(NII.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,NATIL.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME)
	END
END AS RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME
,CASE WHEN CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE = 'GOODS' THEN NP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_ID ELSE NP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END <> 'UNKNOWN' THEN 
	CASE WHEN NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'ORDER MANAGEMENT' OR (NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS'  AND WNICEO.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE  <> 'REVENUE TRANSFER') THEN
		NATIL_ADJ.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
	END
ELSE
	CASE WHEN NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME = 'SALES ADJUSTMENTS'  AND WNICEO.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE =  'REVENUE TRANSFER' THEN
		NATIL.RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
	END
END AS RU_ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DATE
,NABS.BK_BATCH_SOURCE_NAME          
,WNICEO.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE  
,WNICEO. GL_DATE
,WNICEO.SS_CODE
,NULL AS CONTEXT 
,NATIL.PRODUCT_KEY AS  ITEM_KEY
,WNIVIO.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
,CASE WHEN NATIL.AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE   = 'DEBIT' THEN NATIL.RU_DEBIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT   ELSE NATIL.RU_CREDIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT     END AS AMOUNT
,((CASE WHEN WNICEO.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE,1) END) *
(CASE WHEN NATIL.AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE_CR_DR_TYPE   = 'DEBIT' THEN NATIL.RU_DEBIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT   ELSE NATIL.RU_CREDIT_EXTENDED_AMOUNT     END)) AS ACCTD_AMOUNT
,WNICEO.FISCAL_ID
,NCOU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT AS ORG_ID
, WNICEO.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_EXP_OOD WNICEO
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON WNICEO.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
	ON WNICEO.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY 
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_VAL_INV_OOD  WNIVIO
	ON WNICEO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNIVIO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_TYPE NATT
	ON NATT.BK_COMPANY_CODE = WNICEO.BK_COMPANY_CODE
	AND NATT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = WNICEO.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
	AND NATT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE = WNICEO.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
	ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = WNICEO.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_ORG_SOB_COMPANY  EOOSC
ON EOOSC.SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME=NSOB.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_NAME        
AND EOOSC.COMPANY_CODE= WNICEO.BK_COMPANY_CODE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU
ON NCOU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT=EOOSC.ORGANIZATION_ID
AND OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD='OOD'
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL_ADJ
	ON WNICEO.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL_ADJ.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_BATCH_SOURCE NABS 
	ON NAT.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY = NABS.AR_BATCH_SOURCE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
	ON NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNICEO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL_ADJ
	ON NATL_ADJ.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATIL_ADJ.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
	ON NATIL.PRODUCT_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NII 
	ON NP.ITEM_KEY = NII.ITEM_KEY
	AND NII.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = 1
/* commented : rchettri
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_ACCOUNTING_RULE NAAR 
	ON NAAR.BK_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME = NATIL.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME
*/
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR
	ON NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = WNICEO.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE
	AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE           = NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE 
	AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE = WNICEO.TRX_DATE
	AND NCCDR.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE       = 'Corporate' 
WHERE
	(NII.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME  ='MITG Service' OR NATIL_ADJ.RU_BK_RULE_ACCOUNT_RULE_NAME ='MITG Service')
	/* AND WNICEO.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY  < 0 */
	AND NATT.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE = 'CM'
	AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_OOD X WHERE X.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY = WNICEO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY  AND X.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNICEO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)

SELECT DISTINCT  
NATLGD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY, 
NATLGD.AR_TRX_KEY, 
NATLGD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY, 
NATLGD.SS_CODE, 
NATLGD.AR_POSTING_CONTROL_KEY, 
NATLGD.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY, 
NATLGD.ACCOUNT_SET_FLAG, 
NATLGD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE, 
NATLGD.GL_DATETIME 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_OOD WI
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON WI.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST NATLGD
	ON WI.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY =  NATLGD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
 ON WI.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
WHERE 
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LINES EXI
		WHERE EXI.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT  
		)			
OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_APPL_AR_TRX_LINE_ASSGN_OOD EXA
			WHERE  EXA.CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID = NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT   
		)

SELECT
NATLGD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
MIN(NATLGD.GL_DATETIME) AS GL_DATE,
MAX(NATLGD.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY) AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
MAX(EORCTLG.SEGMENT4) AS FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE,
MAX(EORCTLG.CODE_COMBINATION_ID) AS OOD_CODE_COMBINATION_ID
FROM
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST NATLGD
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_GLDT EORCTLG
ON EORCTLG.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID  = NATLGD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT
WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_EXP_OOD WNICEO WHERE NATLGD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNICEO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY)
AND NATLGD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE = 'REV'
GROUP BY NATLGD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY

SELECT
WNICO.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,WNICO.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE
,WNICO.CONTEXT
,'O'  SOURCE_TYPE
, WNGLO.LINE_ID
,'N'  METRIX_FLAG
,'N' SALES_CREDIT_FLAG
FROM
$$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_CUR_OOD WNICO
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON WNICO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_NCR_INV_GET_LINES_OOD WNGLO
ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNGLO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_APPL_AR_TRX_LINE_ASSGN NAATLA
ON NAATLA.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = WNICO.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY               
AND NAATLA.SS_CODE = WNICO.SS_CODE
WHERE WNICO.AR_TRX_TYPE_SHORT_CODE IN ('INV','CM','DM')
AND NAATLA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  IN (SELECT X.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
 FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_ASSGNMENT  X 
			WHERE  X.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CODE = 'O' 
			AND END_TV_DATETIME      = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' 
			)

SELECT 
NATLGD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
,NATLGD.SS_CODE
,CAST(NATLGD.GL_DATETIME AS DATE) GL_DATE
,NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
,NAT.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY     
,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,NATL.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY    
,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE 
,NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
,NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY   
,NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
,NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT 
,NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT 
,NATLGD.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
,NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE   
,CAST(NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) AS TRX_DATE 
, EAMPD.FISCAL_ID 
,NAT.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG AS MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG
FROM
$$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DT EAMPD,
$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST NATLGD
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON NATLGD.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
AND  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='OOD'
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
ON NATLGD.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_KEY
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_GLDT EORCTLG
ON EORCTLG.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID  = NATLGD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT
WHERE EORCTLG.GL_POSTED_DATE IS NOT NULL
AND NATLGD.ACCOUNT_SET_FLAG = 'N'
AND NATLGD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE = 'REC'
AND NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE = 'LINE'
AND NATLGD.GL_DATETIME BETWEEN EAMPD.START_DATE AND EAMPD.END_DATE 
AND  NOT EXISTS 
              ( SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_RV_OOD DRVDR 
			WHERE DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = NATLGD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
			AND DRVDR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
			AND DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='INV'
			)
UNION
SELECT 
NATLGD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY 
,NATLGD.SS_CODE
,CAST(GL.GL_DATETIME AS DATE) GL_DATE
,NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
,NAT.RU_BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_KEY     
,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
,NATL.BK_ADJD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY    
,NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_REASON_CODE 
,NAT.BK_COMPANY_CODE
,NAT.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY   
,NAT.BK_AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE
,NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT 
,NAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT 
,NATLGD.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
,NAT.BK_TRXL_CURRENCY_CODE   
,CAST(NAT.AR_TRX_DATETIME AS DATE) AS TRX_DATE 
,NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT*100 + NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT as FISCAL_ID 
,NAT.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG AS MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLG
FROM
/* $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD, */
$$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM,
$$EXCEPDB.EX_NCR_INV_CUR_EXP_OOD NATLGD
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON NATLGD.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
AND  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE='OOD'
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT
ON NATLGD.AR_TRX_KEY = NAT.AR_TRX_KEY
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
ON NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_KEY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST GL
ON GL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY=NATLGD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_OOD_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_GLDT EORCTLG
ON EORCTLG.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID  = GL.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT
WHERE EORCTLG.GL_POSTED_DATE IS NOT NULL
AND NATLGD.ACCOUNT_SET_FLAG = 'N'
AND NATLGD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE = 'REC'
AND NATL.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_TYPE = 'LINE'
AND GL.GL_DATETIME BETWEEN NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE and NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE 
AND  NOT EXISTS 
              ( SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_RV_OOD DRVDR 
			WHERE DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY = NATLGD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY
			AND DRVDR.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
			AND DRVDR.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD='INV'
			)
